intro: Find the invisible, discover the impossible!
description:
Hidden Legends 2 is a sequel that takes you on an even deeper and more immersive fantasy adventure. This time, the search is truly interactive: items aren't just scattered throughout the level; many are carefully hidden inside the houses of fairytale characters and other environmental objects. Each level is handcrafted, and every discovery requires attention, giving you the feeling of a true detective. You'll explore familiar locations as well as completely new ones. Immerse yourself in the fairytale atmosphere thanks to colorful graphics, a magical soundtrack, and intuitive touch controls.

Game Features:

• Hundreds of unique objects to find.
• Unique handcrafted levels filled with detail.
• Colorful fantasy graphics and charming characters.
• Atmospheric music creates a completely immersive experience.
• Convenient controls with touchscreen support.
• Ideal for those who enjoy hidden object games and quiet exploration.
